description: Source code for a persona generation service using AWS Bedrock, including functions for generating, validating, and persisting persona drafts, with JSON schema validation and external API/database interactions.

methods.name: generatePersonaDraft
methods.description: Generates a persona draft using AWS Bedrock or mock data, validates against JSON schema, and enriches with extracted name and role.

methods.name: createPersonaDraft
methods.description: Persists a persona draft JSON into the database, generating a new draft ID.

methods.name: finalizePersona
methods.description: Copies a saved persona draft from persona_drafts to persona_final table, returning the final persona ID.
